CustomField.description: Returns number of months in a particular period "The original Functionality: {Periodicity} gets copied in {Utilization_periodicity} based on this {Number of Months periodicity} sets as 1 or 3 or 6 or 12. This value further copies to No.of months internal variable. But this variable is used across the file. Since the {periodicity} is not taking user input, it always returns null, then the No.of months internal variable returns 1"
CustomField.label: _Number_Of_Months_Periodicity
